benefits.description: Lost 105lbs over 13-14 months on GLP-1 drugs

protocol_notes: User lost 105lbs on GLP-1 drugs (likely semaglutide or tirzepatide) over 13-14 months under doctor supervision with regular labs. Currently taking for maintenance. Mentions people who have had adverse outcomes from misuse without medical guidance. Mentions tachyphylaxis risk if stopped and restarted.
